title: Vibe Coder
description:
About the job
We're looking for a Vibe Coder — a creative builder who thrives at the intersection of code, AI, and culture.

As a Vibe Coder, you'll shape the way our teams work by designing tools, automations, and AI-powered utilities that make internal workflows smoother, faster, and more fun. You'll prototype new ideas quickly, experiment fearlessly, and bring a hacker's mindset to enhancing human creativity and productivity.

What You'll Do
- Design, build, and maintain internal tools, automations, and AI integrations that empower teams and improve workflows.
- Prototype new AI utilities and productivity features that let humans focus on human things — creativity, strategy, and collaboration.
- Partner with cross-functional teams to discover pain points, design AI-driven solutions, and measure their impact.
- Experiment with emerging tools and frameworks, pushing the boundaries of what's possible with vibe coding platforms and AI coding assistants.
- Translate ambiguous problems into tangible prototypes, testing and iterating quickly to validate ideas.
- Contribute to a culture of playful innovation, helping make technology feel approachable, inspiring, and even a little magical

Requirements
- Experience building products — whether through startups, side projects, open source contributions, or shipping tools inside a company.
- Experience working with vibe coding tools such as v0, Bolt, Lovable, or Chef by Convex.
- Experience working with AI coding editors (e.g., Cursor) to speed up development and experimentation.
- A creative, curious mindset: you love tinkering, prototyping, and bringing abstract ideas to life fast.
- A collaborative spirit: you enjoy partnering with non-technical teams to uncover needs and build impactful solutions.
- Strong problem-solving skills: you're comfortable moving from vague problem spaces to concrete, usable products

Benefits
- Language Classes: Access to language classes (English, Portuguese, Spanish) to enhance communication skills
- OpenAI Premium License: Complimentary access to an OpenAI premium license for personal or professional use
- Paid Time Off: Enjoy 25 days/year of paid vacations and holidays to recharge and maintain a healthy work-life balance
- Soft Hybrid Work: We meet 1 days/week in our Co Work offices, the rest of the time you can work remotely from wherever you like!

title: Vibe Coder (Full-Stack AI/SEO)
description:
About the Role
Adaptify is building the future of AI-powered SEO at scale. We're looking for a vibe coder who can ship fast, think creatively, and build AI-driven tools that help businesses rank and grow organically. You'll work across the full stack — from LLM integrations and content pipelines to frontend dashboards and analytics. We move fast, ship daily, and trust our team to own their work. This is a fully remote, async-first role. No standups, no micromanagement — just great work.

Requirements
- Experience building with LLMs (Claude, GPT, etc.)
- Strong full-stack skills (TypeScript, React/Next.js, Python, Node.js)
- Comfortable with databases (PostgreSQL, Supabase)
- Self-directed and comfortable working async
- Bonus: SEO knowledge or experience

Salary & Work arrangements
- Salary: $40k+ USD/year
- Work Arrangement: Remote (Worldwide)
- Job Type: Full-time
- Experience: Mid
- Technologies: TypeScript, Next.js, Python, Node.js, PostgreSQL
- Vibes: Async-First, No mandatory meetings, No BS, Transparent, direct culture, Deep Work (Focus time prioritized), Global-Friendly (Any timezone welcome), Vibe Coding (AI-assisted development is the norm)

title: AI/ML Computational Science Sr Analyst
description:
About the Role
Senior Analyst role focused on Python-based development and AI/ML integration, responsible for designing, building, testing, and deploying scalable backend services and APIs. The role also involves working with generative AI tools (LLMs, LangChain, OpenAI, Hugging Face), cloud platforms, and contributing as a domain SME in solution design and delivery. Mentions vibe-coding and AI-assisted tools (GitHub Copilot, Kiro) and expects familiarity with LLMs, LangChain and prompt engineering.

Job Description
Role AI/ML Computational Science Senior Analyst (Python Developer) responsible for designing, developing, testing, and deploying scalable Python applications and services, building RESTful APIs and microservices, and integrating AI/ML components. The position expects independent contribution, participation in architecture and design discussions, and becoming a subject-matter expert in the assigned domain.

Key Responsibilities
- Design, develop, and maintain enterprise-grade applications using Python.
- Build scalable RESTful APIs and microservices; integrate third-party APIs.
- Develop and optimize backend services for performance and reliability.
- Participate in solution design, code reviews, testing, and deployment.
- Integrate AI/ML components and work with generative AI (LLMs, LangChain, OpenAI, Hugging Face).
- Contribute as a domain SME in solution design and delivery.

Location & Details
- Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- 1 day ago
- Open Source, Hot
- Experience in Software Engineering

title: App Development Assistant (AI-Assisted / "Vibe Coding") Onsite- Laguna Hills
description:
About the Role
Onsite App Development Assistant at Dentco building web and mobile apps using AI-assisted coding tools to rapidly prototype and ship products. Work directly with the owner in Laguna Hills, CA to implement app concepts, handle hosting/deployment, integrations, and clean up AI-generated code. Explicitly requires vibe coding skills; uses AI coding assistants (Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, Replit, etc.) for rapid prototyping and iteration.

Job Description
Role An onsite App Development Assistant working directly with the company owner to turn app and SaaS concepts into working prototypes and shipped products. The role emphasizes AI-assisted, rapid prototyping and hands-on implementation rather than a traditional senior engineering position.

Key Responsibilities
- Build web and mobile apps using AI-assisted coding workflows and iterate quickly on feedback.
- Handle technical plumbing: hosting and deployment, domains, databases, user authentication, and app store submissions.
- Debug and clean up AI-generated code to maintain project quality and maintainability.
- Set up integrations such as payments (Stripe), email/SMS, and basic APIs.
- Keep projects organized in Git and document implementations.
- Collaborate directly with the owner to align development with business priorities.

Requirements & Qualifications
- Experience building apps with AI coding assistants (Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Replit, Lovable, v0, etc.).
- Hands-on deployment experience (hosting, domains, basic authentication).
- Willingness to work onsite in Laguna Hills, CA.
- Quick learner, resourceful, and thrives in a fast-paced prototype-to-ship environment.

title: Director, Integration & Automation Engineering
description:
About the Role
This is a fully remote, senior-level role at Oura, a company known for its health-focused wearable technology. The position involves leading the Integration & Automation Engineering team to enhance Oura's business technology services and integration platform. This role is ideal for someone skilled in AI-augmented integrations and agentic coding techniques. You'll work with tools like Workato and cloud-native stacks, integrating AI-driven workflows into Oura's systems.

What You'll Be Doing
You'll lead a globally distributed team to develop and manage Oura's integration platform, ensuring seamless connectivity between business systems. This involves transitioning to a full-time team, managing iPaaS platforms, and embedding reliability principles. You'll partner with enterprise architecture and business teams, championing integration standards and secure SOX-compliant solutions.

Skills / Requirements
- Agentic Coding
- AI-Augmented Workflows
- API Services
- AWS
- Azure
- CI/CD
- ERP Systems
- Event Driven Architecture
- GCP
- GraphQL
- Integration Platforms
- iPaaS
- REST API
- SOX Compliance
- Stakeholder Management
- Technical Leadership
- Vibe Coding
- Webhooks
- Workato

Job Details
- Salary Range: $190K - $266K /yr
- Job Type: Full-time
- Work Arrangement: Remote
- Experience level: Senior-Level
